message:
fix(runtime): IoOp resolved guard prevents double-resolve and into_raw escape hatch

IoOp gains a resolved flag and into_raw() escape hatch. complete(),
cancel(), and abort() now check the flag and return
ErrorKind::ObligationAlreadyResolved on double-resolve instead of
forwarding to the obligation table (which would either corrupt
accounting or panic). The methods are changed from self-consuming to
&mut self to support the resolved-flag pattern.

into_raw() explicitly disarms the drop guard and returns the raw
ObligationId, intended for runtime-owned I/O that intentionally outlives
the handle and for tests that model external leaks.

Drop impl now only marks the obligation leaked if not already resolved.

runtime/local.rs: local runtime adjustments.
runtime/state.rs: minor state tracking update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
